# komodo_builder (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo builder resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_builder" "by_id" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}

data "komodo_builder" "by_name" {
  name = "my-builder"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The builder identifier (ObjectId). One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The builder name. One of `name` or `id` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `aws_config` (Attributes) Configuration for an AWS builder. Populated when `type` is `Aws`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_config))
- `server_config` (Attributes) Configuration for a server builder. Populated when `type` is `Server`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--server_config))
- `type` (String) The builder type: `Url`, `Server`, or `Aws`.
- `url_config` (Attributes) Configuration for a URL builder. Populated when `type` is `Url`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--url_config))

<a id="nestedatt--aws_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws_config`

Read-Only:

- `ami_id` (String) The EC2 AMI ID.
- `assign_public_ip` (Boolean) Whether the instance is assigned a public IP.
- `insecure_tls` (Boolean) Whether TLS certificate validation is skipped.
- `instance_type` (String) The EC2 instance type.
- `key_pair_name` (String) The key pair name.
- `periphery_public_key` (String) An expected public key associated with the Periphery private key.
- `port` (Number) The Periphery port.
- `region` (String) The AWS region.
- `secrets` (List of String) The secret names available on the AMI.
- `security_group_ids` (List of String) The security group IDs.
- `subnet_id` (String) The subnet ID.
- `use_https` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is used for the Periphery connection.
- `use_public_ip` (Boolean) Whether to use the public IP for Komodo-to-Periphery communication.
- `user_data` (String) The user data script.
- `volume_gb` (Number) The volume size in GiB.


<a id="nestedatt--server_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `server_config`

Read-Only:

- `server_id` (String) The ID of the Komodo server used as the builder.


<a id="nestedatt--url_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `url_config`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The address of the Periphery agent.
- `insecure_tls` (Boolean) Whether TLS certificate validation is skipped.
- `passkey` (String) Deprecated. Optional passkey for Periphery authentication.
- `periphery_public_key` (String) An expected public key associated with the Periphery private key.
